blockers.description: Detached HEAD on c9597c7. Branch v2/greenfield is checked out in worktree .claude/worktrees/agent-a1fddbff33c497f85; main repo is in detached state.
blockers.workaround: Switch back: cd to that worktree OR git worktree remove and checkout v2/greenfield in main repo.

decisions.decision: Revert orphan perf-fix c9597c7 next session
decisions.rationale: Verified +0 to +4% within noise across 4 test configurations (Apple-M4 unpinned, c7i.4xlarge unpinned, c7i.4xlarge 2-CPU pinned, c7i.4xlarge 4-shard simultaneous). Predicted ~13% lift didn't materialize because apply path isn't the bottleneck. Code is architecturally clean but unverified perf claim shouldn't ship outside a plan boundary.

decisions.decision: Multi-pod cross-node test deferred to next session
decisions.rationale: Setting up 4 server pods + 4 client pods + Service per replica + ConfigMap for register payload + autoscaler scheduling realistically 30-45 min of careful kubectl orchestration. Current session at 28% context budget — risk of context truncation mid-experiment exceeds value. Single-pod 4-shard test (182k aggregate, <1% per-shard variance) provides strong evidence for linear scale-out architectural claim already.

decisions.decision: Pod beava-bench in test/ ns DELETED on pause
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested cleanup. Cluster autoscaler will scale down ip-172-31-23-11 c7i.4xlarge node when idle.

next_action: Switch back from detached HEAD to v2/greenfield branch (currently checked out in worktree .claude/worktrees/agent-a1fddbff33c497f85). Then revert c9597c7 cleanly. Then either /gsd-discuss-phase 13 OR set up multi-pod cross-node test.
context_notes: Phase 12.8 is OFFICIALLY CLOSED at commit 8953fe3 (PASS-WITH-WARN; fraud-team WARN flagged for Phase 13). The post-closure session focused on verifying the orphan perf-fix commit c9597c7 via cluster-based benchmarking. Findings: perf-fix delivers +0% within noise; bench client Pool=N pre-build dominates RAM (~2GB per worker per 250k frames); pipeline depth is the most important client tuning knob (5x EPS lift from pd=1 to pd=256); 4-shard scale-out is genuinely linear (182k aggregate, <1% variance); each Beava instance wants ~2 physical cores (1 apply + 1 IoPool/clients). Production extrapolation: 4x Hetzner AX52 ($340/mo) ≈ 700k EPS for 1M users. Next session priorities: (1) revert orphan commit, (2) multi-pod cross-node test for cleaner per-shard isolation OR (3) advance to Phase 13.
